name: Basil, Potato and Egg Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 lb 4 oz red new potatoes - scrubbed and quartered
1 tbsp Cider or red wine vinegar
1 tsp Dijon or spicy brown mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan over high heat, bring potatoes and enough water to cover to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 15-20 minutes. Drain potatoes; let cool to room temperature.
2. Meanwhile, in a medium bowl combine yogurt, scallions, mayonnaise, vinegar, mustard, basil, salt, and pepper. Fold in eggs and bacon. Add potatoes and gently toss to coat. Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours before serving.
